title: geranium sylvaticum var. uralense
intro: Geranium sylvaticum var. uralense, also known as the Mountain Geranium or Ural Geranium, is a plant species belonging to the geranium genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including wounds, digestive problems, and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting healing. Herbal preparations of Geranium sylvaticum var. uralense include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
